values are the same over time. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care 
for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from reporting plan benefit package information. 

For those plans that did not report, the value of this variable will be blank.
